picks.rationale: Q1 2026 revenue $3.0M vs $2.8M est. Completed Misfits Ads acquisition on May 1, which management notes is immediately accretive to cash-based EBITDA. Strong gap up (+64%) as the market re-rates the company toward profitability by the end of 2026.

Massive +70% gap up following the S-4 filing for its merger with Thramann Holdings. Pivot to AI infrastructure (LT350 data centers) and recent $12.9M financing provides runway into 2027. Classic low-float momentum setup.

Q1 Rev $50.3M (+42% YoY) and secured a $100M strategic investment from Winklevoss Capital at $14/share. With a new CFTC DCO license to expand prediction markets, it has strong fundamental catalysts to support the +28% gap.

Q1 Rev $333.4M (+46% YoY) crushed estimates. Shifting from 'AI victim' to 'AI winner' with 75% of Enterprise users buying extra AI credits. Full-year guidance raised to $1.42B. High quality institutional gap (+9.7%).
Cutting 25% of workforce and transitioning to an 'AI-first' model amidst SEO traffic decline. Lowered 2026 revenue outlook to $165M-$170M caused a brutal -31% gap down. Broken growth narrative setup.

FDA placed full clinical hold on lead drug ARD-101 Phase 3 trial due to cardiac safety signals. Morgan Stanley slashed PT from $7 to $3. Huge -36% gap down with a very narrow window to prove value before running out of cash.
